case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. PASCUAL SANTIAGO ZUNO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNO, PASCUAL SANTIAGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JHONATTAN HERRADA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00- SERVED MAY-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNO, PASCUAL SANTIAGO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNO, PASCUAL SANTIAGO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, ON DEFAULTED LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
